name: E-1 severity override: tuple [error, {options}] surfaces per-rule options on the resolution chain via options.<key>=<value>
command:
printf 'rules:
  g-ts-002:
    - error
    - allow_with_comment: false
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-002 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; grep -q 'effective_severity=error' err.txt && grep -q 'options.allow_with_comment=false' err.txt && echo options_surfaced 1>&2
